title: Master Plast Ear Plug Set of 5
features: Ideal for traveling, sleeping or blocking out any other unwanted Noise
Ears Plugs come with carrying case so you can use them whenever and wherever you are.
description: Product description Disposable Ear Plug Set 4pk. Directions Insert the earplugs into the ear canal to block out unwanted noise. Dispose of them after a single use.
